svg.text: Qwen3-32B. Capability is GPQA Diamond. AM is mean(murder, exfiltration), lower is better.

svg.text: Off-policy trait SFT installs the target behavior but loses capability. Mixed replay keeps the target behavior while returning GPQA close to base.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: Whiskers: base uses eval-resampling intervals; trained arms use seed min-max where available. Mixed-replay AM interval is approximate.
